description: Hermes-like agent that builds a source-backed knowledgebase for top 100 U.S. universities, their majors, and applicant expectations.
next_steps: Repair the remaining clearly under-covered majors-title schools, especially USC, William & Mary, Stevens, American, Carnegie Mellon, UT Austin, NJIT, Fordham, and UC Santa Barbara
Improve Baylor from homepage-directory majors recovery to a direct majors-page or catalog-backed official census once an accessible source path exists in this environment
Improve faculty verification to use official school pages instead of RateMyProfessors-derived fallbacks where possible
Continue replacing low-quality or clearly off-target admissions text in residual partial records
